Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring After Release and Report
CONFIDENTIAL Memorandum re Court Probation Restitution

/CAL:APD MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT/RESTR/X:RESTITUTION TO THE VICTIM, GOLDEN GATE GEN INC,, REMAIN A GENERAL ORDER OF RESTITUTION TO BE DETERMINED BY THE COURT,/CONTPROB/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: NO FURTHER APPEARNACES/

/TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 1 Y:PJ 18 D/CTS:18/WS/RESTRPT: 02-07-22/X: PARTIES STIPULATE THAT DEFENDANT'S VEHICLE MAY BE RELEASED FROM SFPD CUSTODY,/CTORD: DEFENDANT'S VEHICLE TO BE RELEASED TO THE DEFENDANT, THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY WILL COORDINATE WITH SFPD TO FACILITATE SAID RELEASE/SAORD/SA1: 1560 YOSEMITE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD4: 100 YARDS/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/30    CAPD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION  UNIT FOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:02-07-22//CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DAWF/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: DA MOTION TO REDUCE COUNT 2 TO A MISDEMEANORPER PC 17B:/MO GRTD/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THEDEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONSAT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL POSESS NOBURGULARY TOOLS/NTW/SA2:1560 YOSEMITE AVE, SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/LDPX:12-10-21 (10TH)/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 1 HOUR/DOP/
